title: Solidarity not presumed
doc_html:
Art. 1796.  Solidarity not presumed

Solidarity of obligation shall not be presumed.  A solidary obligation arises from a clear expression of the parties' intent or from the law.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
